📋 Promoter Terms & Conditions

1. Event Accuracy

You confirm all submitted event information (date, time, venue, style) is accurate. FloorMap is not liable for incorrect details.

2. Content Responsibility

You are solely responsible for the event content, flyer, and any linked pages.

3. Posting Fee

A fee of €5 per event applies once the free promotional period ends. The first 2 months of posting are free. You will be notified before any fee is charged.

4. Email Communications

FloorMap may notify users who have saved your event type to their favourites. You consent to FloorMap sending promotional emails on your behalf for approved events.

5. Approval

All events are subject to admin review before going live. Submission does not guarantee publication. FloorMap may decline events without explanation.

6. No Refunds

Posting fees are non-refundable once an event has been approved and published.

7. Prohibited Events

Events promoting illegal activity, hate, discrimination or that are misleading will be permanently rejected and the promoter may be banned.

8. Data

Your name and email are stored securely and used only for FloorMap platform communications.

📘 Import Event from Link
Paste any event link — Facebook, Eventbrite, latinworld.nl, or any website. Claude reads it and fills in all the event details. You review, edit if needed, then save to Pending.
⚠ No API key set. Go to Settings tab → Anthropic API Key and paste your key from console.anthropic.com

Uses Claude AI to search the web for upcoming Dutch dance events. Found events go to Pending for your review.

📄 Terms of Service

FloorMap Terms of Service

Last updated: March 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using FloorMap ("the app"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

2. Description of Service

FloorMap is a dance event directory for the Netherlands. We list upcoming dance events including Kizomba, Salsa, Bachata, Urban Kiz, Zouk, Tango and other styles. We also provide a dance step encyclopedia.

3. User Accounts

You must provide a valid email address to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password. You may not use another person's account.

4. Event Listings

Events are submitted by third-party promoters and reviewed by FloorMap admin before publication. FloorMap does not guarantee the accuracy of event information. Always verify with the organiser before attending.

5. Promoter Responsibilities

Promoters who submit events confirm that all information is accurate. Misleading events, events promoting illegal activity, hate or discrimination will be permanently rejected and the promoter may be banned.

6. Posting Fees

Event listings are free for the first 2 months. After this, a fee of €5 per event applies. Promoters will be notified before any fee is charged. Fees are non-refundable once an event is approved and published.

7. Intellectual Property

All content on FloorMap, including the name, logo, and design, is the property of FloorMap. Event flyers uploaded by promoters remain the property of the respective promoters.

8. Limitation of Liability

FloorMap is not liable for any damages arising from your use of the app, including cancelled events, incorrect event information, or any other issues with events listed on the platform.

9. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of FloorMap after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

10. Contact

For questions about these terms, please use the Contact Us form in the app.

🔒 Privacy Policy

FloorMap Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

1. Data We Collect

When you sign up, we collect your name, email address, and marketing preferences. When you submit events, we collect event details and your contact information. We track anonymous visit counts for analytics.

2. How We Use Your Data

Your email is used to identify your account. If you opted in to marketing emails, we may send you information about special dance events and FloorMap updates. You can opt out at any time.

3. Marketing Emails

We only send marketing emails to users who explicitly opted in during registration. Each email includes an unsubscribe option. Event organisers may send emails about their events only to users who have opted in.

4. Data Storage

Currently, user data is stored locally in your browser (localStorage). When we migrate to a full backend (Supabase), your data will be stored securely with industry-standard encryption.

5. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We may share your email with event organisers only for the purpose of sending event updates you have consented to receive.

6. Your Rights (GDPR)

Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You have the right to withdraw marketing consent at any time. Contact us via the app to exercise these rights.

7. Cookies

FloorMap uses localStorage to store your preferences and saved events. We do not use third-party tracking cookies.

8. Children

FloorMap is not intended for users under 16. We do not knowingly collect data from children.

9. Contact

For privacy-related requests, use the Contact Us form in the app or email us directly.

📧 Send Email to Users
Opens your email client with all recipients in BCC. When Stripe/backend is active, this will send automatically.
